titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale-China Association Bachelor Program Records
titlestmt.author: Compiled by James C. Winn

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 09:18

did.abstract: The records consist of selection committee records, applications, orientation and program materials, correspondence, and oral history transcripts documenting the bachelor program of the Yale-China Association.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 37 (YRG 37), Records of associations, institutes, centers, and organizations affiliated with Yale University

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See inventory for details
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale-China Association Bachelor Program Records (RU 234). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright to the official records of the Yale-China Association is retained by the Association. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of selection committee records, applications, orientation and program materials, correspondence, and oral history transcripts documenting the bachelor program of the Yale-China Association

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted until January 1, 2022. Access to the oral history transcripts requires the permission of the Yale-China Association.

did.unittitle: Inventory of Forms in Application for Bachelor Appointments
Bachelor Program: Orientation, Killam's Point Conference Center, Brandford
Bachelors and Yin C., Letters and Papers
Bachelor Correspondence: Chinese University of Hong Kong
Oral History Transcripts: Hutchins, Francis S.

Oral History Transcripts: Rudin, Harry R.
Oral History Transcripts: Weigle, Richard D.
